channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: South Africa's Police Task Team Secures Trial for Three High-Profile Cases

item.title: Exploring Urban Loneliness and Economic Growth in India
item.description: The article delves into the growing phenomenon of urban loneliness amidst rapid economic development in India. It highlights how cities are becoming hubs for economic opportunities but also breeding g...

item.title: Clashes between BIFF remnants and security forces in Maguindanao del Norte result in casualties
item.description: A violent clash between armed remnants of the Bangsamoro Islamic Freedom Fighters (BIFF) and security forces in Maguindanao del Norte resulted in multiple casualties and injuries. The incident, which ...

item.title: Study shows sugary drink tax in Egypt could cut disease and save healthcare costs
item.description: A new study suggests imposing a tax on sugary drinks in Egypt could significantly reduce the prevalence of lifestyle-related diseases like diabetes and obesity, while also saving the country billions ...

item.title: Bryson DeChambeau's Penalty Dispute Causes Tournament Delay Involving Trump
item.description: Bryson DeChambeau, a prominent LIV Golf player, caused a significant delay at The Open Championship by disputing a two-stroke penalty imposed by the Royal and Ancient Golf Club of St Andrews. The inci...

item.title: US Embassy in Namibia to Shift Visa Services to South African Hubs
item.description: The United States Department of State has announced significant changes to visa services for Namibians, effective 1 August 2026. The US embassy in Namibia will no longer provide visa services for citi...

item.title: Studies suggest Canadian female freelancers continue to charge and earn less than male counterparts, particularly in technical fields
item.description: Recent research indicates that female freelancers in Canada continue to earn significantly less than men, despite having the freedom to set their own hourly rates. A study by international payments co...

item.title: CCTV Footage Reveals Police Interaction Before Albert Ojwang's Death
item.description: The Independent Policing Oversight Authority (IPOA) has retrieved deleted CCTV footage from Central Police Station linked to the death of Albert Ojwang, who died in custody in 2025. The footage, dated...

item.title: DND Condemns CCG's Hostile Actions in Ayungin Shoal Incident
item.description: The Department of National Defense (DND) has strongly condemned the recent aggressive actions of the China Coast Guard (CCG) against Philippine Navy personnel stationed at BRP Sierra Madre in Ayungin ...

item.title: Global Fans Travel to Australia for Exclusive Nolan Film Experience
item.description: A group of film enthusiasts from around the world are making the journey to Australia to experience Christopher Nolan's latest film, 'The Odyssey,' in its intended format at Melbourne's IMAX theater. ...

item.title: BBC Presenter Nicky Campbell Apologizes for Using Homophobic Slur in Meeting
item.description: BBC Radio 5 Live presenter Nicky Campbell has issued a public apology following allegations that he used a homophobic slur during a meeting. The incident reportedly occurred when Campbell recounted a ...

item.title: President Samia Says Peace and Security Are Essential for Tanzania’s Infrastructure and Trade Development
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan has reaffirmed that peace and security are the foundation of Tanzania’s development agenda, saying the country cannot achieve sustainable economic growth or become a lead...

item.title: Northern Christians Call for Focus on Insecurity and Poverty Over Vehicle Preaching Bill

item.title: NSSF encourages employers to take advantage of penalty waiver

item.title: Iran's Interior Minister Eskandar Momeni Arrives in Pakistan for High-Level Talks
item.description: Iran's Interior Minister Eskandar Momeni has arrived in Pakistan alongside a high-level delegation, according to Iranian media reports. Upon his arrival, Pakistan's Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi welc...

item.title: Kenyan Content Creator Shares Candid Breast Reduction Surgery Experience
item.description: Kenyan content creator Online Bestie has shared an unfiltered vlog documenting her breast reduction surgery, offering followers a rare look at the procedure. The TikToker filmed her entire experience,...

item.title: LHC Protects Wife’s Dower Rights in Cases of Husband’s Misconduct
item.description: The Lahore High Court (LHC) has ruled that a wife's right to her deferred dower (Haq Mehr) remains protected if marriage dissolution occurs due to the husband's cruelty or misconduct, even if the fami...

item.title: Trump Threatens Tariffs on Canada Over Wildfire Smoke Impacting U.S. Air Quality
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has publicly criticized Prime Minister Mark Carney over the impact of wildfire smoke on American air quality, threatening financial penalties on Canada. During a joint appe...
